data.body: Implemented. Idempotency: _scan_existing_source_ids() builds {source_id->local_id} from the target at start; records with a known source_id are skipped (existing never updated); id_map seeds pre-existing so new tickets can parent/link onto them. Deferred push: REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off for the run (restored in finally) + single push at end. Docs: new docs/import-export.md (feature + large-import KNOWN LIMITATION + pre-compact guidance); concurrency.md pointer. Tests: tests/interfaces/io/test_import_idempotency.py (5: re-run 0 dups, resume-after-partial, existing-not-updated, dry-run skip counts, push env deferred+restored). CLI help goldens regenerated. FULL SUITE: 2191 passed, 9 skipped, 0 failures. ruff clean.
